title: (incorrect) MAL loop instead of manifold triggered by simple change in target list
poc: create table input_double (a1 string, a2 double, prob double);
CREATE TABLE v(a1 int, a2 point, prob double);

SELECT sys.point(a1,a2) AS a1, prob AS prob 
 FROM (
   SELECT tmp_2.a2 AS a1, tmp_3.a2 AS a2, tmp_2.prob * tmp_3.prob AS prob 
   FROM 
     (SELECT a2, prob FROM input_double WHERE a1 = 'latitude') AS tmp_2,
     (SELECT a2, prob FROM input_double WHERE a1 = 'longitude') AS tmp_3
 ) AS tmp;
key_bug_features: MAL loop triggered by target list change
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE input_double (a1 STRING, a2 DOUBLE, prob DOUBLE);
INSERT INTO input_double (a1, a2, prob) VALUES ('latitude', 34.0522, 0.9);
INSERT INTO input_double (a1, a2, prob) VALUES ('longitude', -118.2437, 0.8);
CREATE TABLE v(a1 INT, a2 POINT, prob DOUBLE);

SELECT sys.point(a1, a2) AS a1, prob AS prob FROM (SELECT tmp_2.a2 AS a1, tmp_3.a2 AS a2, tmp_2.prob * tmp_3.prob AS prob FROM (SELECT a2, prob FROM input_double WHERE a1 = 'latitude') AS tmp_2, (SELECT a2, prob FROM input_double WHERE a1 = 'longitude') AS tmp_3) AS tmp;
